item.title: Farm Team Steps In to Help
item.description: A farm crew works together to solve a problem and keep operations moving. Shows teamwork, quick response, and practical problem-solving on a working farm.

media:content.media:title: Farm Team Steps In to Help
media:content.media:description: A farm crew works together to solve a problem and keep operations moving. Shows teamwork, quick response, and practical problem-solving on a working farm.

item.title: Checking a Farm Irrigation Pivot Issue
item.description: Inspecting a center pivot irrigation system to identify and troubleshoot a field watering issue. Focus on farm maintenance, water flow, and keeping crops properly irrigated.

media:content.media:title: Checking a Farm Irrigation Pivot Issue
media:content.media:description: Inspecting a center pivot irrigation system to identify and troubleshoot a field watering issue. Focus on farm maintenance, water flow, and keeping crops properly irrigated.

item.title: Giving My Tractor a Deep Clean Wash
item.description: A satisfying wash and cleanup of a farm tractor. Shows dirt removal, detailing, and maintenance to keep heavy equipment clean, functional, and ready for work.

media:content.media:title: Giving My Tractor a Deep Clean Wash
media:content.media:description: A satisfying wash and cleanup of a farm tractor. Shows dirt removal, detailing, and maintenance to keep heavy equipment clean, functional, and ready for work.

item.title: Preparing the Farm for Harvest Season
item.description: Getting equipment and fields ready for harvest. Focus on planning, machinery checks, and final preparations to ensure a smooth and efficient harvest operation.

media:content.media:title: Preparing the Farm for Harvest Season
media:content.media:description: Getting equipment and fields ready for harvest. Focus on planning, machinery checks, and final preparations to ensure a smooth and efficient harvest operation.

item.title: Recovering a Large Farm Tractor in the Field
item.description: A heavy-duty tractor recovery operation in the field. Shows teamwork, equipment use, and problem-solving to safely recover and move large agricultural machinery.

media:content.media:title: Recovering a Large Farm Tractor in the Field
media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty tractor recovery operation in the field. Shows teamwork, equipment use, and problem-solving to safely recover and move large agricultural machinery.

item.title: Precision Cutting Through Crop Roots
item.description: A farm operation focused on clean, precise cutting through crop roots. Shows agricultural tools in action and careful technique to maintain soil and field efficiency.

media:content.media:title: Precision Cutting Through Crop Roots
media:content.media:description: A farm operation focused on clean, precise cutting through crop roots. Shows agricultural tools in action and careful technique to maintain soil and field efficiency.

item.title: A Full Day Working With Corn on the Farm
item.description: A complete farm day centered on corn operations. Shows planting, field work, and crop handling with practical agricultural tasks and machinery in action.

media:content.media:title: A Full Day Working With Corn on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A complete farm day centered on corn operations. Shows planting, field work, and crop handling with practical agricultural tasks and machinery in action.

item.title: Fixing a Skid Steer on the Farm
item.description: A practical look at repairing and maintaining a skid steer. Covers troubleshooting, mechanical fixes, and keeping essential farm equipment running smoothly.

media:content.media:title: Fixing a Skid Steer on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A practical look at repairing and maintaining a skid steer. Covers troubleshooting, mechanical fixes, and keeping essential farm equipment running smoothly.

item.title: Testing a Heavy-Duty Turf Mower
item.description: Exploring a high-performance turf mower in real field conditions. Focus on handling, cutting power, and practical use for maintaining large grassy areas efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Testing a Heavy-Duty Turf Mower
media:content.media:description: Exploring a high-performance turf mower in real field conditions. Focus on handling, cutting power, and practical use for maintaining large grassy areas efficiently.

item.title: Preparing to Drive Large Farm Trucks
item.description: Learning and preparing to operate large farm trucks. Focus on skills, safety, and handling big rigs for transporting equipment and farm materials efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Preparing to Drive Large Farm Trucks
media:content.media:description: Learning and preparing to operate large farm trucks. Focus on skills, safety, and handling big rigs for transporting equipment and farm materials efficiently.

item.title: A Costly Farming Lesson
item.description: Discover a valuable farming lesson learned the hard way, highlighting challenges, solutions, and practical tips for improving agricultural practices.

media:content.media:title: A Costly Farming Lesson
media:content.media:description: Discover a valuable farming lesson learned the hard way, highlighting challenges, solutions, and practical tips for improving agricultural practices.

item.title: Tractor Upgrade in Action
item.description: Watch a tractor get upgraded with new parts and improvements, showcasing the process, techniques, and practical benefits for farming efficiency.

media:content.media:title: Tractor Upgrade in Action
media:content.media:description: Watch a tractor get upgraded with new parts and improvements, showcasing the process, techniques, and practical benefits for farming efficiency.
